headline: Best Dividend Aristocrats: May 2026
summary: The Dividend Aristocrats underperformed SPY YTD, returning 3.34% versus SPY's 10.39%, though 22 Aristocrats still posted double-digit gains.

headline: Emerson Electric To Co-Develop Corrosion Monitoring Systems With Saudi's Aramco
summary: Emerson Electric partners with Aramco to develop advanced ultrasonic corrosion monitoring and wireless solutions, enhancing operational safety, reliability, and real-time industrial asset management.

headline: Aramco and Emerson Collaborate on Strategic Corrosion R&D
summary: Global automation leader Emerson (NYSE: EMR) today announced it will co-develop next-generation corrosion management solutions for the Saudi Arabian Oil Company (Aramco), one of the world's leading integrated energy and chemicals companies.
